segment-text: Jesse Armstrong Sam Bain
Simon Blackwell
INT. OMAR'S SECRET FLAT(BOMB FACTORY)- LIVING ROOM. NIGHT
Video image. WAJ is 20, a British Pakistani, built like a fridge. He wears camos, a black headscarf & behind him a rug is pinned to the wall. Yeah?
No, sit properly like you're gonna mean it - like you mean it. No, Waj, don't muck about cos the battery's gonna go. Sit... Who's mucking about? but I'm not mucking about.
Well you can't sit like that.
Above shot lasts about a second then we see Omar and Barry are looking at this on the monitor screen of the camera. Barry is filming.
What's wrong with how he's sitting Barry?
Come and have a look, it's wrong.
There's nothing wrong with it.
WAJ gets up to see what he looks like in the camera.
Not you. No. Right what you looking at? There's nothing there.
No there's nothing there. Now, go and sit down. You can't see yourself now can you. I thought you were recording it!
Now sit, sit. Fessal go away. I'm ready, i'm ready.
Alright, Waj just relax your face. Now focus on what you're going to say
We've got to go before the
battery goes.
One, two, three, action.
Video image.... WAJ. He is a proud mujahid - holding his gun. An AK47. Half size. Plastic. Toy. He stares at the lens, pumps himself a face, holds it, looks off...
He has been put off by something Barry is doing.
What's with the gun? Hey it's proper replica man.
What for - action man? Replica AK47.
It's too small, man. It's not too small brother. That's just me hands. Big hands, brother. (looks to Omar)
Shut up, Barry. Try it without our kid and let's go.
It's too small, believe me. (beat) I'll bigger it. I'll hold it nearer the camera that'll bigger it.
Waj proffers the feeble unit & his hand enlarges with the
No,no, this is stupid, this is absolutely stupid....
INT. OMAR & SOPHIA'S HOUSE. DAY.

PULL BACK TO REVEAL THAT OMAR AND SOPHIA ARE WATCHING THE VIDEO ON THEIR TELLY - WITH THE VIDEO CAMERA PLUGGED IN. OMAR IS GLANCING AT SOPHIA AS THEY WATCH, LOOKING A BIT WORRIED - IS THIS OK? IT'S NOT OK ... HE'S EMBARRASSED.
These are the outtakes - the bloopers SHE STROKES HIS HAIR AFFECTIONATELY AS HE ZOOMS THROUGH THE TAPE.
He looks good (indicating Omar on sceren).
WE SEE OMAR ON SCREEN NOW - WAJ NEXT TO HIM. THE VID RUNS FOR A WHILE - OMAR COHERENT - PASSIONATE.
Today is a wake up call. Today is an opportunity for you to look in the mirror at your western...
OMAR CLOCKS SOFIA WHO THINKS THIS IS MORE LIKE IT
imperialist culture, superficial materialism ends at the capitalist church of McDonald's. Flippin idiots
Omar watching the video winces
It's as though you've just had a big mac, completely oblivious to the amount... Complete flippin idiots. You could have gone Chicken Cottage, proper halal, bargain bucket
What you talking about? Talking about Chicken Cottage...
OMAR CAN'T HIDE THIS NONSENSE FROM SOFIA - WHO IS LOOKING LIKE SHE WANTS TO SUPPORT THE PROJECT BUT CAN'T FIND A FOOTHOLD
Dah! There's another one where he doesn't say that.
(OMAR'S 8 YEAR OLD SON) Your bit's good Dad.
OMAR IS CONFLICTED - FRUSTRATED - NODS DISCONSOLATELY AT SCREEN. NOW THERE'S A VIDEO OF FESSAL WITH A BOX ON HIS HEAD.
Take the box off.
I cant show my face because it's an image. An image is a haram.
OMAR LOOKS AT FESSAL WITH HIS HEAD IN THE BOX AND BACK TO
You know what, they're all bloopers. What am I going to do if he does that at the camp? (turns to Mahmood) Mahmood, do you think Uncle Fessal's ready to go to Pakistan? No way.
INT. SECURITY CONTROL ROOM. NIGHT.
We see OMAR and MATT are in front of the bank of TV screens. Security men, staring at the boring footage, looking bored. Omar is deep in thought - can't believe how boring this all is.
(after a long beat) I ran 23k on the weekend. 6k Saturday morning. Had a light lunch. (MORE)

Snack a jacks and a medium apple. 5k in the afternoon. 'Cos obviously it was after lunch, so. Then same again on Sunday. Although in the afternoon I only did 4k cos I'd had a roast. I would have gone further y'know but I started to run a bit lopsided. Yeah, I'm not slagging my right leg off, but my left leg's definitely stronger.

Matt stretches the other leg. Omar is bored shitless looking at his laptop, occasionally registering fake signs of listening. Suddenly something on the screen takes his attention. In an email window - a message from Uncle P reads simply "wedding list full - last chance!!"

I think lefty just wants it more. Righty's bone idle, he just waits there let's lefty to pick up the slack - then before you know it you're running in curves - I'm going to have to put my foot down you know, really show him who's boss, you know what I mean? You can talk to your legs you know.
(makes a decision) I need tomorrow off. What?
I need tomorrow off and the two weeks after that.
Jesus. I thought you were serious about this job Omar?
I've got to go to a wedding in Pakistan.
You've got to ask yourself where you'll be in five years time?
It's an emergency.
What an emergency wedding? Like, a shotgun wedding?
Like a shotgun wedding, yeah.
Well, I'll have a look at the rota.
OMAR'S SECRET FLAT (BOMB FACTORY)- LIVING ROOM.DAY

BARRY IS SITTING IN THE JIHADI POSITION - WAJ IS ON THE CAMERA. THE FIRST FEW BEATS OF DIALOGUE WILL RUN OVER A SLOW ZOOMING ESTABLISHING SHOT THAT LINKS THE SHOPPING CENTRE VIA THE MOTORWAY TO THE BOMB FACTORY WINDOW.
The Feds can track your phone even if the battery's out. Really. They can see you underground right... Can they see you if you're not there?
Where's there? I don't know.
They can see you everywhere, Waj.
Are they looking at us through cameras?
Space cameras, yes
But me dad says I'm not supposed to be on camera - it's haram
With the greatest of respect Fessal your dad eats newspaper
Not any more. He eats moths.
Exactly bro - look the way to stop the Feds tracking you is very simple - you eat your simcard. Get your simcards out. Remove your simcard and... Can I cook mine?
No you must eat it raw. Like this
BARRY GOBS HIS SIMCARD & CHEWS. OMAR BLAMS IN THE DOOR Salam lads
We're eating our simcards
Anti surveillance
(joking) You know they still work inside you Barry - they can still track them inside you - that's not going to be very helpful in Pakistan. What?
Pakistan. I answered the call bro. What call?
Training camp. We're upgrading. We're going.
Why d'you get the call? Why didn't I get the call?
Cos you dont have an Uncle in Pakistan Barry, last time I checked. You've got an uncle in Folkestone. Are there any training camps in Folkestone?
Why do we need training camp anyway? We're primed! We don't need some tramp up a mountain telling us to set a fuse. We don't need some paki Steptoe telling us when to go!
You're right Barry. We can go off any time we want.
Exactly, whenever we want, bro.
Yeah, if you want to be some sad loner trenchcoat mafia twazzock.
What do you mean?
What I mean is - you can either be some stupid nutter Muslim who blows a bag full of nails into his own guts in the toilets at TGI's or you can be a proper soldier in the Mujahideen?
I'm already in the mujahideen.
No you're not bro. Not until you join the army and hold the sword. Touch the sky. (Barry looks interested) Proper chain of command right to the very top.
He points up as if to indicate Allah. Barry thinking hard.
Alright. I'm coming.
Oh you want paki Steptoe now do you?
Listen I am the most Al Qaeda one here.
Think of the group, Barry, think of what we're trying to do, right. It's best you stay here, Barry. You're a liability and you're a loose cannon.
Bollocks I'm a liability. I am the invisible jihadi. (MORE)
They seek him here, they seek him there, but he's not there cos he's blowing up your slag sister!
Invisible? Like the time you got on the local news for baking a twin towers cake and leaving it in the synagogue on 9/11.
That was part of the plan - hide in plain sight you mug. And I am
EXT. BARRY'S CAR / ROAD TO AIRPORT. DAY. INT. BARRY'S CAR/ EXT. ROAD TO AIRPORT. DAY.
Omar is next to Barry. Waj is in the back with Fessal. Beady eyes. Barry is driving Omar and Waj to the airport. Suddenly he outbursts.
You realize if I don't come with you to Pakistan bro Islam is finished!
(soothes) Listen bro, we need you over here to keep a lid on things.
Sure, so what if I'm not here coz I bought a ticket at the airport and I come with you anyways?
Very pleased with this, tetchy Barry depockets his passport. Omar is taken aback.
You wanna come Fess?
Fessal is unexpectedly on the spot
Yeah it's just me dads seeing creatures that's not there. (this is seriously alarming to Fessal)
(to omar re Fessal) So he'll keep it ticking over here bro.
(right) Barry right it you can answer this question you can come.
Barry nods assent.
(in Urdu) How's your Urdu you mouse's minge?
Waj and Fessal laugh. Barry knows he is stumped.
Don't fuck with me man. Don't fuck with Azzam al Britani! (himself)
Fury rising - Barry slams on the brakes - recklessly skidding. - pulls in to layby.
If I'm not going no one is!

A beat. Omar looks at the ignition key. Barry whips it out and shoves it in his gob. Waj grabs Barry's neck, claws his nose from behind him, & starts reaching into Barry's mouth. Barry, making stupid gutteral noises, swallows the key. Its gone down his neck.
(new plan - to Waj ) Right frog him. Frog him in the back bro!
(protesting) No, no frogging, we agreed no frogging, you said no frogging.
EXT. LAYBY / INT. BARRY'S CAR. DAY - CONTINUOUS

Super quick Waj piles out the car. Barry resists until Waj sticks his thumb in his mouth, and walks Barry to the boot of the car. Omar starts to hotwire the car. Barry complies with the frogging physically but protests.
What if you get caught? - I'm not going down just coz you can't take a drill in the knee-cap. They'll crack you like baby's fingers! They'll pump you full of Viagra and make you fuck a dog.
Waj opens the boot. Barry leaning in to Waj as he ties Barry up.
You'll end up on you tube blowing Lassie in a ditch.
Waj flips Barry into the car and slams the boot - Omar wirestarts the car - Waj clambers back into the back of the car - Omar to drive.
INT. BARRY'S CAR. DAY - CONTINUOUS
(to Waj) Bro. My uncle's connected. Only time we'll see cops is for weapons upgrade!
Waj is relieved. Suddenly Barry's head bursts thru the armrest panel in the back seat
Alright Omar, I'm letting you go to Pakistan. My unit stays here. But my unit's the main unit.

Barry - shut up mate - because I tell you, your little brain cell might go off now and again but if your hands even go to move - if you start setting up the Islamic state of Tinsley again - going to university lectures opening your big mouth - buying some more silver nitrate from Amazon - I'm going to rip your plugs out.
Not if you're not here you won't.
With emphatic punctuation Waj slams Barry back into the boot and shuts the armrest on him.
EXT. AIRPORT DAY.
Plane taking off to Pakistan.
EXT. RAWALPINDI STREET/ EXT. TUK TUK. PAKISTAN. - NIGHT
High view of crowded Pakistani city. Tracking front view of Tuk Tuk drives through the crowded streets of a Pakistani city. New sounds.
INT. TUK TUK/ EXT. RAWALPINDI STREET. PAKISTAN - NIGHT.
Waj and Omar with Uncle X are rammed in a row of three facing out through the back. Waj is scoffing a samosa. Uncle eyes them judgmentally. Waj is worried.
(checks Waj, Punjabi) No uncle. (Punjabi) So what in a prostitute's howling trap is this?
He pulls out Waj's prayer reciting teddy bear.
Uncle considers for a moment then shouts through to the
(Punjabi) Stop! The Tuk Tuk screeches to a sudden halt outside a shop.
INT. SHOP RAWALPINDI. PAKISTAN.NIGHT. In a back room full of junk & stores & caged chickens - Uncle
rifles through Omar and Waj's bags. Chucking contents about with contempt - Astronaut food, Sports Nutriment, trainers, socks, bits of low level camping kit. What the fuck's he going to do
They're not rabbits bro, they're chickens. They're rabbits.
Bro, if they're rabbits, where are their ears? That's what I'm saying. Uncle X brandishes an Islam for kids learning book from out
of the rucksack.
(Punjabi) Would you kill him? What?
(Punjabi) He's an idiot - would you kill him? Omar is gobsmacked. What's he saying? (sudden English) I'm asking would he kill you?!
The boys stare at each other - specially Waj.
Pack up. If you make me trouble (Punjabi) I'll stitch your gobs to the fucking shit pipe.
He goes to leave.
Wa-likumasalaam.
Uncle X leaves. Omar exhales in relief.
They start to reload their bags.
(protects him) No - course not. (relief causing joke) I'd kill you bro. Beat.
(half amused) Would you? Yeah.
(what he really thinks) Right good coz I would kill you bro. Bro, seriously I'd kill you, course I would! - I'd kill you like that (clicks fingers) Flippin heck man would ya?
Yeah course. Right, I sort of thought I were jokin' a bit there bro.

We're soldiers bro - whatever's asked - you do it - you do the right thing. Right, you with me? It's life innit, it's just life. What is that? Its nothing. It's like being stuck in the queue at Alton Towers. Do you want be in the queues or do you want to be on the rides. You want to be on the rides dont you? You want to be on Nemesis or Oblivion. (getting it, remembering) Rubber Dingy Rapids. (MORE)
Yeah, rubber dingy rapids! - OK I would kill ya brother Omar! I'd smash your head off with a thing.

Do you know what I'd do Waj. I'd grab one of these hooks and I'd dig it in your belly, I'd rip your guts out and spill them all out like Mortal Combat. I'd take this right and I'd fucking run you over with a tractor.
Yeah? Soldiers brother. Mujahid. Ha ha! Soldiers man! Mujahid!
Exhilarated, they high five and embrace.
Yeah come on, do you want some rabbit, you fucked up rabbit with no ears.
Waj, they're chickens.
EXT. CAR / ROUGH ROAD. PAKISTAN. JUST BEFORE DAWN. Car 4x4 side/headlights speeds through barren landscape.

Omar awake and Waj asleep on him as the car rumbles along. Car bounces through scrub near encampment - stops. The driver opens the door & hauls Omar & Waj out and goes round to the back of the car. Their bags arrive rudely through the air - driver jumps back into car and leaves them there. Alone in a big space. From 50 metres away - a voice
(Arabic) Hurry up - morning prayers (English) You are late.
EXT. TRAINING ENCAMPMENT. PAKISTAN. DAWN.
They hurry over to the encampment - some camo'd tents - a shed and a vehicle - where a bunch of mujahadeen trainees are assembling for prayer.
EXT. TRAINING ENCAMPMENT PRAYER AREA. PAKISTAN. DAY.
Waj is unrolling his prayer mat - but the guy next to him has a big problem with it
Waj is puzzled - his prayer mat is facing the rising sun. This guy is forcing him to spin 180 degrees in the opposite direction.
Omar alerted from his prayer preparations.

Waj we've flown over Mecca now. We've gone past Mecca? (explaining as if to a child) Mecca's in the east yeah? (enunciates slowly) where the (points, mimes a sphere) sun the sun yeah? Where it rises you behn choad paki prong

Khalid is cross & suddenly there. Waj looks massively massively puzzled. Khalid is not impressed. The moment is broken by a noise from the sky. Khalid reacts suddenly calls the trainees in to the shelter of the camo nets around the hut.
(arabic) Drone take cover. American Drone - quick!
As they duck under the nets - Omar spots the AT4 in the back of the motorbike wheelbarrow and starts to pick it up. Khalid knows this won't work.
Hey brother, I'll take it out
(Arabic) too high! (English) too high!
That's what I was thinking. What is that? Two thousand feet?
(in disbelief) What?
EXT. NORTHERN RED BRICK UNIVERSITY - EVENING INT. UNIVERSITY LECTURE THEATRE - EVENING
A well-attended University Islamic Society debate is under way in a lecture theatre, a mixed White/Asian audience. A banner behind the stage reads "Islam - moderation and
progress" with a smaller subtitle "Hallbeck College ISOC
Debate". Barry is on the panel along with religious-looking older Muslim imam, a suited male White MP, a journalist white woman. Chairwoman is Asian, in a headscarf but very westernized.

...in depth knowledge of Islam but what I do know is that most British Muslims they don't want to be out abroad fighting British foreign policy what they want to do is get on peacefully with their daily lives and we support them...
Yeah "A good Muslim always keeps his mouth shut"-yeah- And you're surprised kids are going off to training camps?
That is not what I'm saying...
(turning to Barry) So why are kids going off to training camps?
Right well first off, I object to the term 'training camps'.
You just used it.
(disbelief) No I did not - It's a Western fantasy - you people think of Muslims running around the mountains with guns and bombs. Yeah, that'd suit you down to the ground, wouldn't it!
But - they do exist don't they?...
I'm not saying they don't exist. What I'm saying is - if you'll listen - is that if they didn't exist, you people would have to invent them.
That's absolute rubbish.
Suddenly a young Asian man is on his feet and shouting. HASSAN. 20. British Pakistani, ex public school. He's a wannabe. In a puffer jacket.
(applauding Barry) Yeah! Yeah! Man. This whole debate is twisted, man.
We'll take questions later pleaseHASSAN Nah, nah, nah, man, you think we're all bombers don't you?!
That is absolutely not the case.
The panel stare at him - on the verge of saying no
Nah, nah, nah, when you look at someone like me, you think 'bomber,' right? There's a rising sense of tension.
Yeah you do.
That is not the case.
So why shouldn't I be a bomber, if you treat me like one?
Mashallah brother
Hassan opens his coat to reveal a bomb belt. There's a beat of stillness and uncertainty - people lean away from him, but it all feels unreal.

Yeah mashallah? (starts rapping) Yeah, I'm da mujahideen, an I'm makin a scene, now you'z gonna feel what the boom boom mean, its like Tupak said when I die I'm not dead, we are the martyrs, you're just smashed tomataz - Allahu akbar!
He pulls his cord - his bombs are party poppers. There's confusion - a few shrieks - people not sure what's happened. Hassan reveling in his big point. Barry is the first to fill the stunned gap.
Mashallah, brother.
Hassan is being dragged off by University Security, as he berates the audience.
Oh what man come on? What, just coz I'm Muslim you thought this was real?
Barry turns to another panelist:
Police state. Police state. This is oppression! He's being
rendered. He's being rendered.
EXT. NORTHERN UNIVERSITY/EXT. BARRY'S CAR - LATER. DAY.
Hassan leaves the building. He trips down the steps pleased with himself, Barry is there waiting for him by his car.
Hey bro, bro, down here. Need a lift?
Hassan checks him, recognizes him from the panel. His eyes widen, he looks delighted.
Yeah man wait, yeah.
INT BARRY'S CAR/EXT. NORTHERN RED BRICK UNIVERSITY. LATER.
Hassan is now sat in the car with Barry. (Static.)
Oh man, you're a ledge, you're a ledge bro
You're not so bad yourself - wass your name?
Hassan Malik - the Mal.
The Mal. Nice little stunt back there. (sudden change) But you know what, you're a total piece of shit mate. You're worse than the specially trained rapists they use in Guantanamo. You what?
Barry is suddenly angry. Hassan looks alarmed.
Yeah you're not ignorant like them. You know you should be doing something.
But I am doing something.
Oh, what that?! (impersonates Hassan) "i'm the mujahideen thingy thing rap rap"? Huh?
It was jihad of the mind - the gesture that messed yer ....
Was the prophet Sal Allaahu Alayhi wa Sallam about gestures?! Did he smash the pagan statues? Or did he just stand there making a gesture? Is this a gesture?!
He lets the car into gear and drives idiotically into the wall. Looks at Hassan, nodding.
That was for real brother. Yup.
Hassan looks to the door, Barry locks the car doors from the inside.
Are you for real as that?
Hassan stares back - 90% speechless. Nodding. Wide-eyed. Yup.
How often d'you go to mosque?
(very back foot) Er - when I can most weeks BARRY (interrupts) Once a year is too often! The Mosques have lost it brother- they're full of losers and spies. Hassan is boggling.
These are real bad times bruv Islam is cracking up - we got women talking back - we got people playing stringed instruments- Thomas the tank engine - it's the end of days. Do you wanna be for real?
(quite small now) Yeah of course.
Are you sure?
A hundred per cent.
(pounces on Hass & clasps him in a hug, saying quietly ) Come here. Fuck you Omar!
EXT. TRAINING ENCAMPMENT. PAKISTAN. DAY.
Waj is holding his gun and talking to a phone he has propped up using a pile of rocks as his tripod.
He fires the gun in the air & laughs. Khalid running out of the shed - past a parked donkey.
Stop! stop! (arabic) you stupid donkey's shitbox.
Omar arrives running, from another direction.
Khalid grabs the gun. Grabs the phone. Jabs Waj with the
(arabic) You making signals like you're (english) James fuck Bond?
No! ... no he's not! (to Waj) How did you-?
(furious arabic- hurting waj) These make signals & drones see them and attack us you piece of
Khalid rips the phone to bits and stamps on it. Then carries on whacking Waj.
(arabic) Tomorrow, when we crossing valley to meet sheikh you no! Stay here & clean guns.
SCRIPT at 31.10.09
Massive shocked beat. Waj and Omar stricken - outbursts despite himself.
No, no, no listen! - We need an al Qaeda emir.
(turns on Omar arabic) Shut your bawling English face. (bravely, pained) It were my fault bro, let Omar go.
(english) Both stay! Both - off the jihad - (arabic) After tomorrow you go back to fucking England - you English donkey - & you - (english) fucking Mr Beanz.
But we haven't got an emir yet.
He turns & strides off. Omar - furious and helpless - Waj broken.
I were just getting me pictures bro.
Waj, go away right now.
EXT. FESSAL'S LOCK UP GARAGE - BELOW HIS FLAT. DAY.
Wide shot. Barry, Hassan and Fessal. Approach one garage in a backstreet of 14. Fessal is fiddling with lock.
Woah, woah, woah (checks for surveillance) follow me man.

Fessal opens up the garage door. About 2 feet. They all have to crawl in. The others keeping watch. The last - Fessal having to check for himself. They enter. Hassan filming on his phone. The floor is covered with bottles of bleach & screw top wine bottles - also containing bleach. Fessal talking to Hassan past cam.
Woah, liquid peroxide.
Three years of stockpiling.
Where did you get it all? A wholesale shop down the road.
What? All from the same shop? Yeah.
You mug. You'll get us nicked.
No - I use different voices every time I go in.
Different what?
Different voices.
Different voices? Show me. What?
Show me the voices. Come on.
Well one of them's, my voice "can I have twelve bottles of bleach
Yeah I know what that sounds like. Give me another one. IRA voice.
IRA voice? They're terrorists Fessal. What you wanna do a terrorist voice for? You'll get us nicked.
I'll be in disguise though won't I?
Yeah, but, as a terrorist. Let's hear the voice.
(no change to the voice) "Can I have twelve bottles of bleach please".
Barry's face is a clean slab of disbelief. And then I got one like this as
What's that?
(to Hassan and Barry) It's a woman's voice. Cos I got loads of liquid peroxide. Probably thought she'd go in there and.. And what?
Dye her hair or something.
And her beard? What?
You've got a beard
I covered it.
You covered your beard yeah. How?
Fessal covers his beard, badly, with his hands.
Right. So you went into a shop with your hands on your face like that and asked for twelve bottles of bleach? So why has she got her hands on her face, Fess?
Cos she's got a beard.
Hassan can't believe this - eye checks with Barry who nods solemnly - oh yes.
EXT. TRAINING ENCAMPMENT. PAKISTAN. DAY.

Guns in the back of the motorbike wheelbarrow, including an AT4 missile launcher in box. Rag cleaning bits of gun. On the ground beside the battered vehicle & shed & tents. Parked goat is impassive. Waj is distressed. Waj and Omar have been left behind.
Omar carries on cleaning guns.
(beat) Maybe it were God's will I were doing me video so maybe it's not my fault.

(stops, turns) No. It is your fault. It was God's will that you were acting like a complete prat, apparently. But it was deffo your fault. So if that were God's will then am I God's fault? Maybe I am God's mistake. Does that mean I'm going to go to hell brother? Do mistake's go to hell? (starts wittering)

Omar doesn't know what to say - goes back to cleaning the guns - but is distracted by a distant buzz. Both hear it. They stare at each other a beat. Omar scans the sky - finds something low on the horizon.
Ssh. That's a drone! Hide!
It's flying low. Its going to attack!
Waj stares at it - fearful. Looking over his shoulder - we see it in the distance, approaching, zoom in to it. Shit!
Where we gonna go Waj? - We gotta take it out! Take it out with what? We ain't got no bullets. It's my mistake bro. It's my mistake.
No, no no. Waj now think about it. This is God's plan. He's put us here to defend the camp didn't he? This is our jihad. Now think about it. It's still my mistake.
Nah, no no that's the devil in your brain giving it the wasawasa Dont listen to him. God is in your heart bro. What's your heart say bro? Trust me. Come on.

(looks at the missile Omar's speech sinks in) maybe we should er(pause) maybe we should flippin pop it brother. Get back on the jihad! (nervously clocking the approaching drone) Yeah yeah. What we going to use? This bro.
Fucking yes!
He's into the back of the vehicle opening a box with US markings on it. He reveals an AT-4 launcher & Spigot missile. Omar is manhandling the missile launcher out of the back.
SCRIPT at 31.10.09

Waj withdraws. Cam is with Waj looking at Omar.Omar hits the button. A missile shoots out - but it shoots out of the back of the launcher and off across the valley. Omar was bracing himself the wrong way so he falls forward flat on his face. the launcher cricket-stumps out of his grasp. Waj looks at the disappearing missile & back to Omar.
Omar looks up from the dust.
(horror) The Arabs! That's where the emir is.
The missile is streaking towards the sheikh's camp across the valley where smoke from the chimney indicates they have a fire in the grate. 3 dreadful seconds. The missile hits.
Oh flippin shit. Is this God's will bro, tell me it is? Tell me it's God's will bro.

The drone flies harmlessly past and away from both camps. Then all hell breaks loose at the Arab farm. gunfire and a couple of rockets - zooming across the valley. Omar and Waj - in a total funk legging it away from the farm towards the road. Ordnance throwing up pillars of soil behind them. Both shouting, screaming... crying.
EXT. FESSAL'S HOUSE ESTABLISHER. DAY.
Barry, Hassan and Fessal arrive outside in Barry's car. woman and baby passes by on the pavement.
(to woman and baby) Morning officer. You've been rumbled.
They go inside the house.
INT. FESSAL'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM. DAY.
In the dingy mess of Fessal's small house, Hassan still filming. Things moving very fast for him.
So what my plan is right?... Put a bomb on a crow - fly it into one of them towers full of Jews and slags... I keep crows in the shed. Have a look.
Hassan is amazed.
We're way beyond crows now Fessal. We are really going to blow the lid off.
Yeah I'm all about blowing the lid off man. Blow my lid off.
(beat) Bomb the mosque! Fessal. Hassan shocked. What?
The Maschid?
Yeah, the maschid, the mosque. But we go in dressed like kuffar. They think its the unbelievers attacking. So all the Muslims rise up and fight back! Stoke
